# Inspect Docs

> A Quarto project type extension for Python package documentation with automatic API reference generation.

## Home

- [Home](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect-docs/index.html.md): A Quarto extension for Python package documentation with automatic API reference generation.

## Articles

- [Articles](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect-docs/articles.html.md): Writing prose pages alongside your API reference—navigation, diagrams, and README handling.

## Reference

- [Reference](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect-docs/reference.html.md): Generating API reference pages for your Python package and its Click CLI commands.

## Interlinks

- [Interlinks](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect-docs/interlinks.html.md): Automatic cross-linking of inline code to reference pages—locally and across other inspect-docs sites.

## llms.txt

- [llms.txt](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect-docs/llms.html.md): Making your docs LLM-friendly with auto-generated llms.txt and per-page Markdown sources.
